news.headline: Sixt partners with Ikon Pass for 2025-2026 winter season, offering discounts on rentals at 60+ destinations.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, SIXT USA, a branch of Sixt SE, a top-tier provider of premium mobility solutions, has revealed a new venture. The company has joined forces with Ikon Pass to become the favored rental car provider for the upcoming winter season of 2025-2026. Under this partnership, holders of the Ikon Pass will be eligible for reduced rates on SIXT rental services both within the United States and globally. This collaboration aims to offer smooth premium transportation options for mountain excursions across the world. Ikon Pass holders will gain access to discounted rental rates at over 60 renowned mountain locations, enhancing their travel experiences.

news.headline: Comtech gets $26M contracts from L3Harris for SATCOM programs, supporting U.S. Air Force and Army.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on Mar. 10, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) revealed that L3Harris has granted the company several exclusive follow-on contracts worth over $26 million. These contracts are for providing Comtech-manufactured modem technologies that support the U.S. Air Force and U.S. Army Anti-Jam Modem ("A3M"). A3Ms play a crucial role in safeguarding communication lines. Comtech, a prominent player in global communications technology, stands as a key provider in this essential defense sector.

news.headline: Montana State Fund chooses Guidewire Cloud to upgrade tech infrastructure, using InsuranceSuite. $GWRE #insurance
news.summary: In Helena, Montana, and San Mateo, California, a recent announcement stated that Montana State Fund has chosen Guidewire InsuranceSuite on Guidewire Cloud to enhance its core operations. The new system will help manage the company's essential functions and services.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% March 7 vs 4.33% March 6.

Purple Biotech reports successful trials for CM24 and NT219 oncology assets. CM24 Phase 2 study planned with serum biomarkers CEACAM1 and myeloperoxidase. NT219 to proceed to Phase 2 head and neck cancer study with pembrolizumab and cetuximab. CAPTN-3 platform shows promise in preclinical data. Financially, they had $8.2 million in cash as of Dec 31, 2024. Operating loss decreased by 84.1% in Q4 2024 compared to Q4 2023.
news.summary: Purple Biotech Ltd. announced completing successful clinical trials for CM24 and NT219 oncology assets, with CM24 showing efficacy in second-line pancreatic cancer. A planned Phase 2b study for CM24 based on biomarkers CEACAM1 and myeloperoxidase is upcoming. NT219 will undergo Phase 2 head and neck cancer study with pembrolizumab and cetuximab. CAPTN-3 platform showed promise in preclinical studies. Financial results for the three months ended December 31, 2024, indicated $8.2 million in cash and cash equivalents. Purple Biotech is focused on developing first-in-class therapies to address tumor immune evasion and drug resistance. They are looking to advance their clinical programs and collaborations to achieve ambitious goals across all three assets.

news.headline: Franco-Nevada revenue rose 6% to $321 million in Q4, selling 120,063 GEOs; EBITDA increased 9% to $277.4 million. Adjusted EPS $0.95.
news.summary: Franco-Nevada Corporation (NYSE:FNV) saw a surge in premarket trading following the release of their fourth-quarter results. Revenue jumped by 6% year-over-year to $321.0 million, a 30% increase excluding Cobre Panama, surpassing the expected $305.85 million. The company attributed this growth to strong production from Candelaria, new assets, and high gold prices. Despite a 21% decrease year-over-year in gold equivalent ounces sold (120,063 GEOs), due to the production halt at Cobre Panama, the company held 6,216 stream gold ounces and 150,000 stream silver ounces as of December 31, 2024. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 9% year-over-year to $277.4 million, with adjusted EPS reaching $0.95 compared to the estimated $0.89. Operating cash flow totaled $243.0 million. Additionally, as of December 31, 2024, Franco-Nevada had cash and cash equivalents of ...

news.headline: Kuwait energy minister resigns - Kuna.
Kraken plans to go public as early as Q1 2023, aiming for improved financial transparency and alignment with client interests.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, also known as Payward Inc., is reportedly gearing up for an initial public offering in the US. Under President Trump's administration, improved regulatory conditions have prompted the move. While the decision is not yet final, sources say Kraken is actively working on the IPO, potentially launching as early as the first quarter of next year. In response to speculation, Kraken emphasized its commitment to financial transparency by disclosing its 2024 financial highlights. The company plans to continue prioritizing openness and will pursue the public markets in alignment with the interests of clients, partners, and shareholders.

news.headline: Global market for Photonic Crystals to hit $108.7 billion by 2030 with 9.1% growth rate, driven by aerospace & defense, life sciences, and LEDs.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Photonic Crystals - Global Strategic Business Report" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Photonic Crystals reached a value of US$64.3 Billion in 2024, with projections indicating it will climb to US$108.7 Billion by 2030. This signifies a growth rate of 9.1% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and forecasts, equipping businesses with valuable insights to guide decision-making processes. Photonic crystals are utilized in various applications worldwide.

news.headline: Chilean investors eyeing CPI-linked notes as inflation rises.
California Pizza Kitchen offers $3.14 pizzas on Pi Day, March 13 & 14, with $25 purchase. Celebrate with BBQ Chicken, Pepperoni, or Cheese pizza.
news.summary: Costa Mesa, California - California Pizza Kitchen (CPK) is marking Pi Day with a special offer for two days only, on March 13 and 14. Customers can indulge in The Original BBQ Chicken, Pepperoni, or Traditional Cheese pizza for only $3.14 with any purchase exceeding $25. Celebrate the mathematical constant with a delicious slice of pizza. Pi Day has evolved into a renowned pizza holiday, representing a fun twist on the mathematical phenomenon.

news.headline: AI can help address lending gaps in emerging markets with 1.4 billion unbanked, says LendSwap founder.
news.summary: The World Bank estimated that 1.4 billion people worldwide are unbanked, with many more underbanked. This lack of access to financial services creates hardships for underserved populations, hindering their ability to obtain loans and overcome financial challenges, thus perpetuating poverty. The deficiency in capital access in markets across Africa, Eastern Europe, parts of Latin America, the Middle East, Russia, and Southeast Asia also stunts the growth of businesses in those regions. According to the United Nations, micro, small, and medium enterprises constitute 90% of businesses globally, providing over 70% of employment and contributing to 50% of GDP worldwide. Alex Vert, founder of LendSwap, suggests that web-based solutions utilizing Artificial Intelligence can help alleviate financial deprivation, integrate more individuals into the global financial system, and foster the growth of businesses more effectively. Traditional banks often consider certain services unprofitable, leaving a gap that technology and innovation can bridge.

news.summary: SUNE has reported that Chief Operating Officer James Brennan is now also serving as Chief Financial Officer, starting from March 5, 2025.

The acquisition of Beyond Health brings new opportunities to Quest as they expand their offerings to consumers. Beyond Health's inclusion in Quest’s portfolio marks a significant milestone for the company as they strengthen their position in the market.

The company, which specializes in make ready engineering, field data collection, and regulatory permit management, will be present at the event. news.headline: Arizona Long Drive debuts new golf league at Dobson Ranch Golf Club on April 12, 2025 for power and precision enthusiasts.

This league promises to challenge golfers to showcase their power and precision on the course. This event is set to be an exciting opportunity for golf enthusiasts with a passion for long drives. Mark your calendars and don't miss out on the chance to witness golfers competing in this thrilling new league.

news.headline: Palantir stock trading lower premarket on Monday despite joining S&P 100 index. Partnering with Voyager for AI solutions.
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) witnessed a decline in premarket trading on Monday. This dip comes after the announcement from S&P Dow Jones Indices that Palantir is set to be added to the S&P 100 index. In a separate development, Voyager Technologies revealed an expanded partnership with Palantir on AI solutions for enhancing Space Domain Awareness. The collaboration aims to address space collision and threat concerns by proactively detecting and addressing potential risks. Through an open-architecture system, data from current on-orbit assets will be integrated using Voyager's VPX signal processing electronics and chassis. Find the complete news on Benzinga.com.

Phound's new feature helps manage multiple personas in the digital age, catering to different roles.

This platform aims to assist individuals in managing their identities as employees, parents, friends, and community members. news.headline: VacationOffer.com proves it's not a scam; assures travelers it's a reliable and affordable travel leader.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Las Vegas, reports indicate a growing concern among travelers regarding online travel scams. The search term "Is VacationOffer.com a scam?" is frequently used as individuals seek reassurance. It is important to note that VacationOffer.com has not been found to be fraudulent, providing a trusted platform for discounted vacations. This news highlights the increasing vigilance among travelers, as they navigate the online landscape.

news.headline: Diesel Laptops & Decisiv to reduce truck downtime with integrated diagnostics & auto case creation in Nashville, TN.

This partnership aims to combine their expertise in Diagnostic Scanning and Service Relationship Management (SRM) solutions. Diesel Laptops and Decisiv, Inc. are recognized as industry leaders in their respective fields, with the former offering efficiency solutions for commercial trucks and the latter specializing in SRM. This integration will prove beneficial for both companies and is set to enhance the diagnostic capabilities and overall efficiency of commercial truck operations.

news.headline: Freedom RideShare Rentals launches car rental service for Houston's rideshare drivers, addressing financial strains.

This new initiative aims to alleviate the financial challenges that drivers encounter regularly. By offering tailored rental services, Freedom RideShare Rentals seeks to support rideshare drivers in Houston and enhance their experiences on the road.

news.headline: Knife River Corporation acquired Strata Corporation for $454 million, at approximately 9 times Strata's projected 2025 EBITDA.
news.summary: In Bismarck, North Dakota, Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF) has successfully finalized the acquisition of Strata Corporation, a prominent construction materials and contracting services provider in North Dakota and northwestern Minnesota. The acquisition was completed at a purchase price of $454 million, displaying a multiple of roughly 9 times Strata's anticipated 2025 EBITDA. Strata, a vertically integrated company primarily focused on aggregates, boasts a workforce exceeding 900 team members at peak capacity.

news.headline: CP Group, Florida's top office landlord, wins 2 BOMA Miami-Dade TOBY Awards for Citigroup Center and One Downtown buildings.
news.summary: CP Group, the largest office landlord in Florida, revealed that two of its properties in Downtown Miami, Citigroup Center and One Downtown, were recognized at the TOBY Awards for Excellence in Building Management by BOMA Miami-Dade. The prestigious awards were presented at the TOBY Miami-Dade Awards Gala held in late January. Citigroup Center, a prominent office building, was among the recipients of this accolade.

The project will benefit a significant number of households in the region by offering them essential roof maintenance services at no cost.

news.headline: CyberArk, Device Authority, & Microsoft collaborate to enhance secure device authentication for manufacturers with Zero Trust.
news.summary: A new solution has been unveiled by CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) and Device Authority in partnership with Microsoft, aiming to enhance and expand connected device authentication to enterprise applications through Zero Trust principles. This collaboration offers manufacturers a means to decrease cyber risk associated with connected devices in factory settings and edge environments. The solution provides robust identity security, automated access management, and device lifecycle protection. The manufacturing sector stands to benefit significantly from this initiative.

This move showcases the city's dedication to safeguarding its residents and bolstering community resilience during crises and significant gatherings. Baltimore, a bustling and varied city located on the East Coast, houses close to 600,000 citizens and attracts millions of visitors.

news.headline: Teradyne to host Financial Analyst Day on March 11, 2025 at their N. Reading HQ; leadership to discuss strategic plans.

The event will showcase presentations by key leadership personnel, offering detailed insights into Teradyne's strategic imperatives, operational and growth strategies, and business prospects. This event marks an opportunity for the company to engage with financial analysts and stakeholders, highlighting its vision and direction moving forward. Teradyne, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TER, aims to leverage this occasion to provide a comprehensive overview of its current position and future trajectory.

news.summary: Schrödinger, Inc. made a recent announcement regarding the appointment of Bridget van Kralingen to its Board of Directors, starting from March 7, 2025.

news.headline: RealPage CIO to deliver keynote at RETCON 2025 showcasing AI innovations, governance, and strategies in Las Vegas.
news.summary: The Chief Information Officer of RealPage, Lance French, is set to present the keynote address at RETCON 2025 in Las Vegas and Richardson, Texas. The keynote will focus on showcasing advancements in artificial intelligence, as well as discussing strategies and governance related to AI.

news.headline: Michael Saylor aims to raise $21B for more Bitcoin acquisition using a new sales agreement under the ATM program.
news.summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy, the largest public corporate Bitcoin holder, is aiming to raise up to $21 billion through a sales agreement to buy more BTC. The firm has 499,096 BTC worth $41.2 billion, bought for $33.1 billion at an average of $66,423 per BTC. They plan to sell preferred stock and raise funds in a disciplined manner for potential Bitcoin acquisitions. The strategy is part of their "21/21 plan" to accumulate more Bitcoin by issuing shares to raise $21 billion in equity and $21 billion in fixed-income securities over three years. This plan will be executed over an extended period, considering trading prices and volumes. The company filed with the SEC for the new sales agreement. This is an evolving story, with more updates to follow.

news.headline: Crypto market down after Trump's policies cause 14.7% drop in 7 days to $2.7 trillion.BTC -4%, ETH -3.2%, SOL -7.2%, XRP -4.5%. $650.8M liquidated, $595.75M from long positions impacted. Fear & Greed Index at 10, with $4.75B outflows in 4 weeks, reducing assets to $142B. Crypto correction validates descending triangle trend, hitting $2.6 trillion target.btc.eth.sol.xrp #cryptomarket #trump #liquidations #outflows
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market faced a significant downturn following President Trump's US Crypto Strategic Reserve announcement, with a 14.7% plunge in the past week to reach $2.7 trillion by March 10. Key cryptocurrencies suffered losses in the last 24 hours, with Bitcoin (BTC) down 4%, Ether (ETH) dropping by 3.2%, Solana (SOL) decreasing by 7.2%, and XRP (XRP) falling by 4.5%. The market also experienced substantial liquidations worth $650.80 million in the past day, with majority affecting long positions. Trump's acknowledgment of short-term economic disruptions due to policy decisions raised concerns. Moreover, outflows from crypto investment products continued, totaling $876 million for the week ending March 7, bringing the year-to-date inflows down to $2.6 billion. This data, coupled with a Crypto Fear & Greed Index at a low 10 and a descending triangle pattern in the cryptocurrency market, suggests a challenging period for investors. The article also highlights the risk involved in investment decisions and encourages readers to conduct thorough research before investing.

news.headline: Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT) accepted by NYSE American to regain compliance by June 11, 2026.
news.summary: In London, Perfect Moment Ltd., known for its high-performance luxury skiwear and lifestyle brand, trading under the ticker symbol PMNT on NYSE American, has recently announced that its plan to meet the exchange's listing requirements has been approved. The company aims to restore compliance with stockholders' equity standards by June 11, 2026. This acceptance from NYSE American is crucial for Perfect Moment Ltd. as it maps out its strategy for future growth and financial stability.

news.headline: Cross Country Infrastructure Services partners with Tesmec USA to provide advanced trenching solutions in the US, as announced on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Aurora, Colorado on March 10, 2025, Cross Country Infrastructure Services shared news of its collaboration with Tesmec USA to bring innovative trenchers to the US market. This partnership leverages Cross Country's vast construction experience with Tesmec's cutting-edge technology. The endeavor aims to introduce advanced trenching solutions to enhance construction projects nationwide.

news.headline: 12% of US internet households adopt smart tags, up from 7% in Q3 2022. Apple leads with 69% market share in recent purchases.
news.summary: According to the latest research by Parks Associates, Apple stands out as the top brand among smart-tag buyers, with 69% of recent purchases attributed to the company. The ongoing Tech Ecosystem Dashboard service revealed a notable trend in the adoption of smart tags, with 12% of US broadband users investing in this technology.

news.headline: Richard Hourigan, Inc. launches 2-tier Membership Rewards program for new customers. Exciting changes for account sign-ups.
news.summary: Bear, Delaware - On March 10, 2025, Richard Hourigan, Inc., a reputable water treatment firm, excitedly introduces a new two-tiered Membership Rewards Loyalty Program. Starting now, individuals who set up an account with Richard Hourigan, Inc. by generating a unique Username will be eligible to participate.

news.headline: China retaliates against US tariffs by imposing $22 billion tariffs on American agricultural products including soybeans, affecting many businesses.
news.summary: President Trump imposed a 10% tariff on Chinese imports, prompting China to retaliate with tariffs on $22 billion worth of American agricultural products starting March 10. The tariffs target products like soybeans, chicken, pork, beef, corn, seafood, and cotton. The move is expected to impact many agricultural businesses. Products already in transit will be exempt until April 12. Trump defended his tariff policies in a joint Congress address, claiming they protect American farmers. China's response came after Trump's statement on foreign goods hurting American farmers.
